outcomes.outcome: Health behaviour: blood glucose self-monitoring 2 times per day (capped at 2), self-report (short-term: immediately post-intervention)
Self-efficacy to manage one's disease (short-term: immediately post-intervention)
Any generic health literacy (short-term: up to 1 month post-intervention)
Any health-related knowledge, 0 to 100 (short-term: up to 1 month post-intervention) - all studies
Health behaviour: fat-related dietary habits, self-report (short-term: 1-month post-intervention)
Health behaviour: physical activity, average daily steps (short-term: immediately post-intervention)
Health behaviour: physical activity, average daily steps (short-term: three months post-intervention)
